name: Absolute World V (Marilyn Monroe)
address: 50 Absolute Ave, Mississauga, ON L4Z 0A8
why_strong: Iconic Marilyn Monroe tower with 30k sqft Absolute Club amenities (pool, gym, theatre, squash). 11-min drive to CVH via 403W. Direct line to Square One mall (10-min walk), Celebration Sq, Hurontario LRT (opens 2026). 72 units rented past 12mo = liquid market. 1BR from $1,999.
why_weak: Curvy floorplate creates odd wedge-shaped rooms; some units have <520sqft. Hwy 403 noise on north exposures. Older 2012 build with dated finishes in some units.

name: Absolute World IV (Marilyn Monroe)
address: 60 Absolute Ave, Mississauga, ON L4Z 0A9
why_strong: Twin to 50 Absolute, slightly newer (2011). Same 30k sqft amenity podium shared with 50. 16 active rentals = best inventory in zone. Hourglass shape gives wraparound balconies on most units. Walk to Sheridan College Mississauga campus (12 min).
why_weak: Same curvy floorplate issue; tiny kitchens. Building-shared Absolute Club gets crowded weekends. North-facing units overlook 403.

name: Absolute III (70 Absolute)
address: 70 Absolute Ave, Mississauga, ON L4Z 0A4
why_strong: Rectangular Absolute tower (not curvy) = better floorplans. 594sqft 1BR at $2,100 verified Feb 2026. Same Absolute community pool/gym access. Steps to Bus Rapid Transit (BRT) and future Hurontario LRT Absolute stop.
why_weak: Less iconic than Marilyn Monroe; resale less premium. Fernbrook build quality moderate; some balcony glass replacement issues reported 2023.

name: Absolute Vision (80 Absolute)
address: 80 Absolute Ave, Mississauga, ON L4Z 0A5
why_strong: 669sqft minimum 1BR is LARGEST in Absolute community - actual livable footprint. Fernbrook 2009 build with 9-ft ceilings. 6 active 1BR rentals. Shared Absolute Club access. Walk to Square One in 12 min.
why_weak: Older finishes (2009). 27-storey scale less amenity-dense than newer towers. Limited 2BR inventory.

name: The Absolute I (90 Absolute)
address: 90 Absolute Ave, Mississauga, ON L4Z 0A6
why_strong: Cheapest Absolute tower for 1BR (from $1,950). Original 2007 build = lowest base rent in cluster. 1+den layouts up to 900sqft. Same amenity podium access. Value play for the Absolute community.
why_weak: Oldest of the 5 Absolute towers (2007); kitchens/appliances dated. Smaller amenity allocation. 27-storey podium feels less luxe than newer Marilyn Monroe pair.

name: Onyx Condos
address: 223 Webb Dr, Mississauga, ON L5B 0E8
why_strong: Davies Smith 2011 chic 36-storey with rooftop pool, common deck. Webb Drive corridor = best walkability density. 9.2 min to CVH - cheapest commute in zone via Confederation/Hurontario. Steps to Living Arts Centre, Celebration Square.
why_weak: Rent floor is $2,400 per Strata (no sub-$2,200 1BRs typical). Only 2 active rentals = thin inventory. 532sqft floor units feel cramped.

name: Solstice Condos
address: 225 Webb Dr, Mississauga, ON L5B 4P4
why_strong: Davies Smith 2008 38-storey with rare 2-storey loft floor plans (unique in zone). Webb Drive = quietest pocket of City Centre. Direct walk to Daniels Spectrum, Square One (10 min). Dash PM building = solid management.
why_weak: 2-storey lofts only available for select units; mostly conventional 1BR. Older 2008 finishes. Webb Drive corridor narrower amenity strip vs Burnhamthorpe.

name: Citygate II
address: 220 Burnhamthorpe Rd W, Mississauga, ON L5B 4P6
why_strong: Davies Smith 2006 35-storey, 38 units rented past 12mo = very liquid. Burnhamthorpe/Confederation corner = peak walkability. 1+1 at $2,300 (April 2026). Low $0.72/sqft maintenance. Steps to Square One.
why_weak: Smallest units start at 400sqft. Some 2BR push $2,900 (Apr 2026 listing). 2006 lobby/finishes show age. Construction-era HVAC.

name: Ultra Ovation at City Centre
address: 330 Burnhamthorpe Rd W, Mississauga, ON L5B 4N2
why_strong: Tridel 2010 32-storey directly across from Celebration Square. Walkability 124 POIs (highest in zone - mall food court adjacent). 1BR Unit 1406 at $2,150 active. Tridel build quality + concierge. 6 active 1BR rentals.
why_weak: Older 2010 finishes. Some N-facing units overlook noisy Burnhamthorpe. Square Sq events bring noise summer weekends.

name: Ovation I (South Tower)
address: 3880 Duke of York Blvd, Mississauga, ON L5B 4M7
why_strong: Tridel 2004 31-storey. Median 1BR rent $2,219 (March 2026). Club Ovation = 30k sqft amenities including 4-lane BOWLING ALLEY (unique). 1+1 at $2,150 (April 2026, 584sqft). Direct walk to Square One in 5 min.
why_weak: 2004 build = oldest of Square One core. Smaller balconies. Has had window/balcony glass remediation projects.

name: Ovation II (North Tower)
address: 3888 Duke of York Blvd, Mississauga, ON L5B 4P5
why_strong: Tridel 2007 twin to Ovation I, slightly newer. Shares Club Ovation (pool, bowling, virtual golf, theatre). 8.9 min CVH - tied for fastest in zone. National Corporate Housing operates corporate suites here = predictable management.
why_weak: Same 2007-era finishes. Connected to Ovation I podium = shared amenity congestion. 1BR floor 520sqft.

name: City Gate Condos
address: 3939 Duke of York Blvd, Mississauga, ON L5B 4N2
why_strong: Davies Smith 2005 35-storey with 326 units. 32 rentals/yr = very active lease market. 1BR+2den $2,500 (March 2026) Celebration Square view. Direct sightline to Sq One mall. Walk to Hurontario LRT future stop (200m).
why_weak: Some 452sqft microsuites. 2005 build dated. Lofts on top floors carry premium.

name: One Park Tower
address: 388 Prince of Wales Dr, Mississauga, ON L5B 0A1
why_strong: Daniels 2008 38-storey - 4th tallest building in Mississauga. Faces Mississauga Celebration Park (true greenspace, not just plaza). 1+1 at $2,500 verified. Daniels build quality = predictable. 10 active rentals.
why_weak: Premium pricing (1BR floor $2,300+). 2BR pushes $3,000. Higher floors with park views command top end.

name: Chicago Condos
address: 385 Prince of Wales Dr, Mississauga, ON L5B 0E9
why_strong: Daniels 2010 36-storey with rare amenities: ROCK CLIMBING WALL, virtual golf, theatre, indoor pool. 1BR+Den (#616) at $2,500. Kirkor architecture = clean lines. 6 active 1BR rentals. Directly faces park.
why_weak: 439sqft floor unit microsuite. Some podium-level units have limited light. Heavy amenity load = high condo fees pass-thru.

name: Elle Condos
address: 3525 Kariya Dr, Mississauga, ON L5B 0C2
why_strong: Amacon 2010 31-storey with 9-ft ceilings, 45-ft balconies on some units. Recent 1BR at $2,150 (April 2026). Walk to YMCA, Mississauga Library, Living Arts Centre. South of Burnhamthorpe = quieter.
why_weak: 328 units = larger building, less personal. Some 500sqft floor units. Less amenity-luxe than newer Marilyn Monroe.

name: Eve Condos
address: 3515 Kariya Dr, Mississauga, ON L5B 0C2
why_strong: Amacon 2009 32-storey twin to Elle. Modern open-concept layouts. 276 units (smaller than Elle = less amenity strain). Cheapest verified 1BR floor in core Square One ($1,975). Walk to Sheridan College in 8 min.
why_weak: 2009 build dated finishes. Some lower units face Kariya street noise. Limited concierge hours.

name: Park Residences at Parkside Village
address: 4099 Brickstone Mews, Mississauga, ON L5B 0G2
why_strong: Amacon 2014 36-storey, newest of PSV cluster. Faces Zonta Meadows greenspace (true park - rare in zone). 600-699sqft 1BR at $2,100 (recently leased). Pool, sauna, rooftop deck. 6 active 1BR. Hurontario LRT terminal nearby (2026 opens).
why_weak: Some 419sqft microsuites. PSV cluster crowded - 4 towers within 200m. Brickstone Mews narrow access road.

name: Capital Towers I
address: 4080 Living Arts Dr, Mississauga, ON L5B 4N3
why_strong: Daniels twin-tower with distinctive pyramid roof. 'The Retreat' 14k sqft amenities: vaulted-ceiling pool, virtual golf, home theatre, 2 patios with BBQs, billiards. 8.9 min CVH - tied fastest. 4 active 1BR rentals.
why_weak: Pyramid roof gives top-floor units odd ceiling geometry. Connected to Capital Towers II = shared amenity load. Daniels finishes mid-tier.

name: Capital Towers II
address: 4090 Living Arts Dr, Mississauga, ON L5B 4N4
why_strong: Twin to Capital I. Shares 'The Retreat' amenity podium - one of best amenity programs in zone. 5 active 1BR rentals via Strata. Living Arts Centre adjacent (concerts, theatre = built-in date night). Walk to Square One in 8 min.
why_weak: Same pyramid-roof quirk. Living Arts Dr has weekend foot traffic. 530sqft floor for 1BR.

name: Pinnacle Grand Park II
address: 3975 Grand Park Dr, Mississauga, ON L5B 0K4
why_strong: Pinnacle 2018 48-storey - one of newest builds in zone, 9-ft ceilings, marble/granite counters. 8.5 min CVH = FASTEST in entire zone via Confederation. 28k sqft amenities. 1BR at $2,200 verified April 2026. Hurontario LRT terminal at MiWay opens 2026. T&T supermarket across street.
why_weak: South Square One pocket = less foot traffic at night vs core. 543sqft 1BR floor. Premium for newer build.

name: Sherwood Towers
address: 200 Robert Speck Pkwy, Mississauga, ON L4Z 3P9
why_strong: VALUE PLAY: 1983 build = MASSIVE units (861sqft minimum 1BR is 2x core Square One sizes). Best $/sqft in zone. Quiet Robert Speck office corridor. 10.6 min CVH. Underbuilt for current market = renters get house-sized condos at apartment prices.
why_weak: 1983 finishes throughout - kitchens/baths likely original or basic reno. Older HVAC. Fewer amenities (no concierge typical). 20-floor scale modest vs core 35+ storey. Office-park surroundings feel dead nights/weekends.
